name: Bethlehem
hooks: someone is still looking for shelter

name: Nazareth
boons: practice reveals dignity in small work
hooks: a familiar name carries an unfamiliar calling

name: Jordan River Crossing
boons: reflection makes a new start easier to name
hooks: the far bank asks what should be left behind

name: Cana
boons: careful attention notices trouble before it becomes shame
hooks: the feast has one more guest than expected

name: Capernaum
boons: neighbors can carry what one household cannot
hooks: someone at the threshold cannot reach the room

name: Sea of Galilee Shore
boons: shared labor makes fear easier to speak
hooks: the wind has shifted before every boat returned

name: Hillside of Teachings
boons: a difficult teaching can be heard without haste
hooks: the person at the edge of the crowd has a question

name: Bethsaida
boons: introductions open roads that argument cannot
hooks: a missing tool has stopped the morning repair

name: Caesarea Philippi
boons: naming a loyalty can clarify the road ahead
hooks: the cliff returns every answer in a changed voice

name: Sychar Well
hooks: a traveler has arrived without a jar

name: Jericho
boons: attention can restore someone to the shared road
hooks: the climb begins before every pilgrim is ready

name: Bethany
boons: familiar hospitality gives sorrow room to breathe
hooks: an extra place has been set at the table

name: Jerusalem
boons: pilgrims can find one another across distance
hooks: several roads demand an answer before nightfall

name: Garden of Gethsemane
boons: companionship can remain even when it cannot fix the hour
hooks: someone has asked their friends to stay awake

name: Road to Emmaus
boons: walking together lets a broken story be told again
hooks: a stranger has joined the road at the right pace
